title: Replication data for the article: "The Neomycin cassette impairs maternal and social behaviors in Arc KO mice", by Dudas et al.
author: Dudas, Ana
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This dataset contains all raw data with statistical analyses, representative microscopy images and images of the blots used for protein quantification presented in the submitted article: 
 Dudas A., Caire E., Hassan A Kuku H., Marchand O., Azzopardi N., Annamneedi A., Elseedy H., Jugnarain V., Vacher H., Lefort G., Piegu B., Yvinec R., Pecnard E., Bruneau G., Drobecq L., Trouillet AC., Sirigu A., Kuhl D., Chamero P., Ohana O., Pellissier L.P.  The Neomycin cassette impairs maternal and social behaviors in Arc/Arg3.1 knock-out mice , 2026.
